title: Sproctor
compiled_truth: Sproctor is an external contact at [Andrews Kurth](companies/andrews-kurth). Over the corpus period (2002-02-20 to 2002-06-21), Sproctor sent 52 and received 51 emails, totalling 103 interactions. Top correspondents: [Joe Parks](people/joe-parks) (38), [Chris Germany](people/chris-germany) (14), [Ruth Concannon](people/ruth-concannon) (7), [Stuart Zisman](people/stuart-zisman) (7), [Chris Meyer](people/chris-meyer) (6).
